parameter.value: Ola |PLAYERNAME|. A pandemia ficou feia, e fui obrigado a fechar a arena e vender os itens para poder sobreviver. Se tiver interesse diga {trade}.

orcish maul,7392,50000;headchopper,7380,50000;blacksteel sword,7406,50000;cranial basher,7415,50000;heroic axe,7389,50000;mystic blade,7384,50000;justice seeker,7390,50000;royal axe,7434,50000;blessed sceptre,7429,50000
